column1: The property listings, pricing information, ratings, and roommate evaluations presented in this spreadsheet are mock data created for research and demonstration purposes. These entries are representative of typical rental listings in the Metro Atlanta area but do not correspond to specific real properties or actual individuals. Any addresses, pricing, or descriptive details are illustrative and have been modified or synthesized to preserve privacy. This mock dataset was used to demonstrate the comparison workflow and support analysis of collaborative rental decision-making without exposing personal search history or identifiable information.
